mano_cua.result_summary: 边创建功能存在严重bug：通过右键Delta→双击'Dallas Fort Worth International Airport'创建边时，生成的DOT代码未对多单词节点名加引号（Delta -> Dallas Fort Worth International Airport），导致DOT只将'Dallas'解析为目标节点，创建了错误的新节点'Dallas'，原节点'Dallas Fort Worth International Airport'未被连接。图形从2个节点变成3个节点。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The test results are now clear. Steps: 1) Opened Graphviz Visual Editor. 2) Cleared editor and pasted DOT code with two nodes. 3) Right-clicked Delta node (edge creation mode). 4) Double-clicked Dallas Fort Worth International Airport node. Bug found: generated DOT code lacks quotation marks around multi-word node label, causing incorrect parsing - new erroneous 'Dallas' node created, original multi-word node remains unconnected. Graph shows 3 nodes instead of 2 connected nodes. FAIL - critical quoting bug in edge creation.
